summary: Researched Python formula generator design: algebraic AST type in new formula/ module, complexity-bounded enumeration mirroring Lean Formula.complexity, stratified random generation, and 10-operator near-miss mutation suite for contrastive pairs. No new dependencies needed.

artifacts.summary: Full design for FormulaNode AST dataclasses, enumerate_by_complexity, random_formula, near-miss mutators, file layout, testing strategy, and design rationale.
